title: Ginger-Infused Slovakian Fish Pilaf
description: A light and kid-friendly Slovakian dish featuring ginger and yuzu-cure.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chopped onions and cook for 3-4 minutes, until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the basmati rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the skillet, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, until the rice is cooked.
While the rice is cooking, prepare the yuzu-cure by mixing it with a tablespoon of water.
Cut the cod fillets into small pieces and add them to the skillet with the yuzu-cure.
Simmer for 5-7 minutes, until the fish is cooked through.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the fish on top of the rice pilaf.
